provenance.prompt: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter, overhead photograph of exactly ten people standing in a plaza with clear visual separation between each person, each person roughly the same size in the frame, even distribution not clustered, neutral plaza floor, clear visibility of every individual, no overlap between figures, no children hidden behind adults
provenance.negative_prompt: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
